name: CoinTracker
description: CoinTracker — Crypto tax and portfolio tracking platform with API, DeFi support and 3M+ users

seo.title: CoinTracker — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: CoinTracker: CoinTracker — Crypto tax and portfolio tracking platform with API, DeFi support and 3M+ users

when_to_use: Crypto capital gains tax reporting for investors in 20+ countries
DeFi and staking income tracking for compliant crypto tax filing
API integration for exchanges to provide users with tax documents
Portfolio tracking and cost-basis calculation for crypto accountants

pros: Clear DeFi, NFT and staking handling
Generates country-specific tax forms (US, UK, others)
Portfolio tracking is genuinely useful year-round
cons: Pricing escalates quickly with transaction count
Cost-basis edge cases still need manual review
API access reserved for higher tiers
Occasional sync breakage on obscure chains
review.verdict: One of the most polished crypto tax tools for retail — priced for active traders, not whales.
review.best_for: Individual crypto investors with activity across many wallets and DeFi protocols.
review.not_for: Institutions needing audit-grade controls or enterprise API throughput.
